title: Decart’s Oasis 3 world model opens real-time driving simulation via API
friendlyTitle: Decart opened a real-time driving simulation model
summary: Decart launched Oasis 3, a real-time world model for photorealistic driving environments, aimed first at autonomous-vehicle simulation and later broader robotics and physical-AI use cases, with API access available at launch.
friendlySummary: Decart launched Oasis 3, a world model for photorealistic driving simulation, with API access.
whyItMatters: World models could make rare physical scenarios cheaper to test, but the caveats matter: consistency, physics, controls, and long-term memory are still hard. The practical value is simulation as a developer platform, not magic realism.
friendlyWhyItMatters: Simulation could make rare physical situations cheaper to test, but real physics, memory, and control are still hard problems.
